name: karpathy-principles
description: Karpathy-inspired coding discipline for AI agents. Provides the four core behavioral guidelines (Think Before Coding, Simplicity First, Surgical Changes, Goal-Driven Execution) as a reusable skill plus canonical AGENTS.md / Copilot instruction templates. Reduces over-engineering and improves output quality across Grok, GitHub Copilot, Claude, Cursor, and other agents.
